title: ANIIDCO Executive Chef Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO)
short_info: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Executive Chef Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years (Relaxable: 05 years for ST and Govt. Servant and 03 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 Years Age Relaxation: 05 years for ST and Govt. Servant, 03 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 2nd class three years Degree/Diploma in Hospitality Management & Hotel Administration from a Government recognized Institute in India or equivalent Degree/Diploma from abroad approved by Government of India with 05 years post qualification relevant experience in 3-5 Star Hotels/Resorts.
qualification.details: Executive Chef: Minimum 2nd class three years Degree/Diploma in Hospitality Management & Hotel Administration from a Government recognized Institute in India or equivalent Degree/Diploma from abroad approved by Government of India with 05 years post qualification relevant experience in 3-5 Star Hotels/Resorts.

salary_details.details: Salary: Level-6 (35400-112400) Allowances: Dearness Allowance, SCA, HRA, TA, ISDA as admissible under rules.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIDCO Executive Chef Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://andamannicobar.gov.in, https://aniidco.and.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIDCO Executive Chef recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the ANIIDCO Executive Chef recruitment is 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive Chef post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum 2nd class three-year Degree/Diploma in Hospitality Management & Hotel Administration from a Government recognized Institute in India or an equivalent degree/diploma from abroad approved by the Government of India.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for the Executive Chef position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 05 years of post-qualification relevant experience in 3-5 Star Hotels/Resorts is required for the Executive Chef position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Executive Chef post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Executive Chef post is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 05 years for ST and Government Servants, and 03 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Executive Chef position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Executive Chef position is as per Level-6, ranging from ₹35,400 to ₹1,12,400, along with admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email to [email protected] or through hard copy to the General Manager (P&A), ANIIDCO Ltd., Vikas Bhawan, P.B. No. 180, Sri Vijaya Puram.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Attested copies of all testimonials, certificates, and 2 passport-size photographs are required to be submitted with the application.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official websites of ANIIDCO: https://andamannicobar.gov.in and https://aniidco.and.nic.in.
